message:
fix: bug fixes in HypothesisIntake and HypothesisArena components

- Remove unused imports (IdentifiedConfound, validateHypothesisCard)
- Remove unused customMechanism field from IntakeFormData
- Fix leader statement ellipsis always showing even for short statements
- Add proper accessibility attributes to clickable paragraph in CompetitorCard
- Include uncommitted validation helper improvements in hypothesis.ts
